user.title: Connect to Aisle 5
user.description: Generate an API key in Aisle 5 under Settings > Home Assistant and enter it here along with your backend address.

data.base_url: Aisle 5 address (Docker/production: http://<vm-ip> via port 80/443; local development: http://localhost:3001). Do NOT expose port 3001 directly in production.

error.cannot_connect: Connection failed. Please check the URL and API key.

abort.already_configured: This Aisle 5 instance is already configured.
